use tracing::{trace, Level};
use serde::Serialize;

#[derive(Serialize)]
struct Payload {
    records: Vec<Record>,
    metadata: Metadata,
}

#[derive(Serialize)]
struct Record {
    id: u64,
    values: Vec<f64>,
}

#[derive(Serialize)]
struct Metadata {
    source: String,
    timestamp: u64,
}

fn process_event(payload: &Payload) {
    // GOOD: use tracing's lazy evaluation — serialize only if enabled
    trace!(
        records = payload.records.len(),
        source = %payload.metadata.source,
        "processing event"
    );
}
